componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Before Completing a PRF:

  • The contract must be approved and activated.
  • If the contract is not activated, you can't move it to 'Complete'.
  • Product Support Case must be Closed and the 'Product Support Setup Complete' field must have a date & time in it.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
For FRM/HALO Set-ups:

﻿

·       Upload extra information to the files section.

·       This includes Group names/structures and Driver Data.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
Assessments

﻿

For dynamically assigned E-Learning answer "yes" to "Drivers receive all online E-Learning?" and skip the E-Learning section below.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value:
E-Learning


If the customer needs specific E-Learning modules assigned after Assessment completion, please choose the modules from the list below.

componentInstanceProperties.name: label
componentInstanceProperties.value: Upload the Group structure and required languages
